GitHub

SkyNav

Documentation Module

Horizontal Navigation

A glass navigation shell that can render horizontally or vertically, while optionally disabling the rounded edge treatment for dashboard rails and flat chrome surfaces.

import { SkyButton, SkyNav } from '@sky-ui/react-sky';

export function Example() {
return (
  <SkyNav theme="midnight" orientation="horizontal" rounded>
    <SkyButton color="cyan" theme="midnight">Overview</SkyButton>
    <SkyButton color="violet" theme="midnight">Telemetry</SkyButton>
    <SkyButton color="emerald" theme="midnight">Launch</SkyButton>
  </SkyNav>
);
}

Documentation Module

Vertical / Flat Rail

Use the vertical orientation for side rails, mode switchers, or compact tool docks. Set rounded to false when the surface should align to a flat edge or a parent panel.

Orientation

Horizontal or Vertical

The layout switches between a wrapped action row and a stacked tool rail without requiring separate components.

Shape Control

Rounded Optional

Disable the rounded edge when the nav needs to sit flush against a workspace frame or card boundary.

Responsive Behavior

Wraps Cleanly on Small Screens

The horizontal mode wraps items automatically, while the vertical mode keeps a consistent rail width for smaller viewports.

Iconography

Navigation icon language

LayoutGrid
Compass
Rocket
Cloud
Waves
Sparkles

Anatomy
